sidebar.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete this project and all its conversations? Files in the project folder are untouched.

tasks.title: Scheduled tasks
tasks.subtitle: Create scheduled tasks in any conversation with natural language; they run in that conversation on schedule and keep the results there.
tasks.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Just ask in any conversation, e.g. "Generate an AI daily report at 9am every day".

composer.askUserWaiting: 程小帮 is waiting for your answer…

onboarding.title: Add a model to get started
onboarding.desc: Enter an API key for any model to start using 程小帮. You can also open Settings for full configuration.

chat.compactionHint: Earlier messages were summarized; future turns continue from the summary
chat.artifactPreview: Click to preview on the right
chat.artifactOpenExternal: Click to open in the system app

app.disclaimer: 程小帮 can make mistakes. Check important info.

setup.title: Set up a model
setup.desc: Add one model with an API key to start chatting. You can change it later in Settings → Providers.

rightPanel.changesNoProject: Open a project folder first — uncommitted changes show up here.
rightPanel.changesNotRepo: This project is not a Git repository.
rightPanel.changesBinaryFile: Binary or oversized file; content hidden
rightPanel.chatEmpty: Start a small standalone chat in this project without interrupting the main one.
rightPanel.chatPlaceholder: Ask anything, press Enter to send
rightPanel.terminalNoProject: Open a project folder first — terminal commands run in the project directory.
rightPanel.terminalUnsupported: The embedded terminal is not available in this desktop environment.
rightPanel.browserEmpty: Enter a URL to start browsing, e.g. example.com or a local port like 5173.
rightPanel.browserPlaceholder: Enter a URL, press Enter to visit
rightPanel.filesEmpty: Click a file path next to a tool call in the chat, or pick a file to preview.
rightPanel.fileDesktopOnly: File preview is only available in the desktop app.

ide.noneDetected: No local app detected for this project
ide.desktopOnly: Use the desktop app to open projects in local apps

home.heading: What should we work on in {{name}}?
home.headingNoProject: What should we work on today?
home.subtitle: Your desktop AI coding companion, ready when you are.

starters.pptPrompt: Make a presentation on "A Brief History of Artificial Intelligence", plan the overall structure and key points per slide, and generate the PPT file.
starters.docPrompt: Write a "Guide to Effective Remote Work" document with a clear structure and complete key points, and save it as a Word file.
starters.refactorPrompt: Refactor this code to make it cleaner and easier to maintain:
starters.debugPrompt: I ran into this error — help me find the cause and fix it:

skills.title: Skills & Commands
skills.listDesc: Type / in the composer to quickly invoke these built-in tools and skills.
skills.manageDesc: Create your own skill as <name>/SKILL.md (with name and description frontmatter) in the skills folder; it appears here after a restart.
skills.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDesc: Choose the app's light/dark appearance. "System" follows macOS automatically.

general.title: General
general.permDesc: The tool-execution permission new chats start with. You can switch it anytime from the composer.
general.approvalDesc: Ask for your confirmation before writing files, running commands, etc.
general.fullDesc: Run every tool automatically without confirmation (higher risk)

providers.title: Providers
providers.configuredDesc: Pick one to edit, or add a new one below.
providers.required: Configure at least one provider with an API Key before using the app.
providers.chooseTypeDesc: Pick a provider type first, then fill in the API key and details.
providers.name: Name
providers.modelPlaceholder: Enter or choose a model ID
providers.keepKey: API key saved — leave blank to keep it

feishu.title: Feishu Bot
feishu.connDesc: Uses a Feishu Open Platform self-built app over a WebSocket long connection — no public URL needed.
feishu.enableDesc: Keeps a long connection: DMs answer directly, groups require @-mentioning the bot
feishu.fullAccessDesc: Read-only by default: writing files and running commands are auto-denied
feishu.fullAccessWarning: When enabled, messages from Feishu can directly read/write local files and run commands. Make sure you trust everyone who can reach this bot.
feishu.guideDesc: Create a self-built app on the Feishu Open Platform, then follow these steps. Note: messages sent while the app is closed are not redelivered.
feishu.guide1: Create a self-built app on the Feishu Open Platform and enable the Bot capability
feishu.guide2: Grant im:message:send_as_bot and the im:message.receive_v1 event permission; im:chat:readonly is recommended for session naming
feishu.guide3: In Events & Callbacks, switch subscription to Long Connection and add the im.message.receive_v1 event
feishu.guide4: Create and publish a version, then add the bot to the group chats you need
feishu.guide5: Fill in the App ID / App Secret above and save — once it shows Connected you can chat from Feishu

notice.providerRequired: Configure at least one model with an API Key first.
notice.openFolderDesktopOnly: Opening a folder requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-picker access.
notice.addContextDesktopOnly: Adding file context requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-read access.
notice.attachmentBlock:
Here is the content of file {{name}}:

```
{{text}}
```
notice.openArtifactDesktopOnly: Opening this file requires the desktop app

plan.heading: Plan
plan.bookmarkLabel: Plan progress {{index}} / {{total}}, jump back to the plan card
